data.title: Lieutenant General Laura Potter, USA (Ret.) Joins Academy Securities’ Advisory Board and Geopolitical Intelligence Group
data.description: New York-based investment bank, Academy Securities, known as the first of its kind to be owned and operated by Post-9/11 veterans, has welcomed Lieutenant General Laura Potter to its Geopolitical Intelligence Group. This division of Academy Securities comprises 43 distinguished members, including US and UK Admirals & Generals, former NASA Astronauts, and former CIA/FBI Leadership. With over a decade of experience, Academy serves as a leading advisory on geostrategic risk in the market. The recent addition of Lieutenant General Laura Potter further enhances the expertise and knowledge base within the Academy GIG, solidifying its position as a top player in the industry.

data.title: Vertical Aerospace Advances Piloted Flight Testing, Manufacturing and Demand for Valo
data.description: In a recent announcement from London and New York, Vertical Aerospace, a leading global aerospace and technology company specializing in electric aviation, unveiled its 2025 Annual Report. The report contains the financial outcomes for FY25, along with details on the ongoing flight test program, advancements in manufacturing, and commercial developments. Interested parties can access the Annual Report on the Company’s Investor Relations platform and at www.sec.gov. To provide further insights, Vertical will conduct a webcast today at 08:30 Eastern Time (12:30 Greenwich Mean Time), spearheaded by Ch.

data.title: Trane Technologies Exceeds DOE Heating Capacity Requirements in Commercial Building HVAC Technology Challenge
data.description: Trane Technologies, a leading global climate solutions provider, has accomplished all necessary laboratory tests for its rooftop units (RTUs) in the 10-14 and 15-25 ton capacity categories, which were submitted for the U.S. Department of Energy's (DOE) Commercial Building HVAC Technology Challenge. The company has also been singled out by the DOE for surpassing the optional heating capacity requirements on the smaller RTU, further demonstrating its commitment to innovation and efficiency. Trane Technologies, listed under NYSE as TT, continues to enhance its offerings to meet and exceed industry standards.

data.title: Expro to Deliver Geothermal Well Testing Services for Groundbreaking Lionheart Project in Germany
data.description: Expro (NYSE:XPRO) in Houston has secured a contract to provide well testing services for the initial Schleidberg well in Vulcan Energy’s Lionheart Project. This project is a notable geothermal and lithium extraction endeavor in Europe and has been recognized as a crucial initiative under the European Union’s Critical Raw Materials Act. The Lionheart Project stands as one of the most substantial programs for geothermal and lithium extraction in Europe. This collaboration aims to fortify the geothermal and lithium sectors in the region.

data.title: Thompson Street Capital Partners Completes Growth Investment in Karpel
data.description: Thompson Street Capital Partners (TSCP), a St. Louis-based private equity firm, revealed today its investment in Karpel Computer Systems, Inc. Karpel is a leader in providing prosecutor case management software to state and local government agencies. The company, founded in 1985 and headquartered in St. Louis, is known for its case management system (CMS) software tailored for prosecutor and public defender offices. The terms of the growth investment were not publicly disclosed.

data.title: SOL projected to reach $110 by April with RSI at 54.54, price above moving averages, and strong bullish momentum.
data.description: Positive signs are emerging for SOL as its Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 54.54 and its price remains above important moving averages. Analysis indicates a potential target of $110 within the next 4-6 weeks if resistance levels are surpassed. These promising trends point towards a bullish momentum for SOL in the near future.

data.title: TNC Stock Drop: Tennant Company Investors with Losses Notified of Rights in Pending Securities Fraud Investigation After Stock Plummeted 23%
data.description: BFA Law is currently conducting an investigation into Tennant Company following a significant 23% decrease in its stock value attributed to problems with its ERP system. This incident has raised concerns of potential violations of federal securities laws. The inquiry was revealed on March 24, 2026, by prominent securities law firm Bleichmar Fonti & Auld LLP.

data.title: Bimergen Energy to Present its $2B Growth Strategy at the Emerging Growth Virtual Conference on April 2nd
data.description: Bimergen Energy Corporation, a major player in utility-scale and distributed battery energy storage systems in the US, is confirmed to be part of the Emerging Growth Virtual Conference on April 2, 2026 - set to take place from 1:45 to 2:15 pm Eastern Time. The company's stock, listed as BESS on NYSE American, will be a focus during this event. For those unable to attend the live session, a recording will be accessible on the EmergingGrowth.com YouTube Channel post-event.
Amaze and LA Times Studios are launching Food Channel LA, a new creator-led commerce platform for food enthusiasts.

data.title: ECB official notes stablecoins, tokenized deposits require central bank backing to grow in Europe's markets. Pontes and legal reform recommended.
data.description: Piero Cipollone, a member of the Executive Board of the European Central Bank, highlighted that relying solely on private digital currency would not be sufficient to expand Europe’s tokenized markets. He emphasized the importance of initiatives such as Pontes and more extensive legal revisions as the next stages in this process.

data.title: Data Center Liquid Cooling Market worth $27.65 billion by 2033 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on March 24, 2026, the Data Center Liquid Cooling Market report by MarketsandMarkets highlights key findings. The market is segmented by component into solutions and services, catering to end users such as colocation providers, enterprises, and hyperscale data centers. Various factors such as cooling medium, data center type, and type of cooling are considered in the analysis. This information provides valuable insights into the growing market, which is projected to reach significant numbers in the near future.

data.title: Electric Three-Wheeler Market Outlook: Forecast to Grow at 15%+ CAGR by 2031 Amid Policy Support and Rising Last-Mile Delivery Demand, Says Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, a recent report from Mordor Intelligence revealed significant growth in the electric three-wheeler market. In 2025, the market size reached USD 3.65 billion and is expected to increase to USD 4.2 billion by 2026. By 2031, the market is projected to reach USD 8.47 billion. This growth signifies a compound annual growth rate (CAGR)...

data.title: HK Green Bonds secure 4.75% rate; HKMA's 5th payout. Inflation at 1.28% in 6 months maintains low.
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has officially announced the fifth interest payment for retail green bonds, offering a fixed rate of 4.75%. This announcement comes as the average inflation rate in Hong Kong has remained low at just 1.28% over the past six months.
